ESCORT.template: {clientName} hires the crew to bring {targetName} safely to {planetName}, despite the threat from {enemyGroupName}.

HEIST.template: Break into {targetCorpName}'s facilities on {planetName} to steal sensitive data.
{clientName} pays handsomely to empty {targetCorpName}'s vault, right under {securityGroupName}'s nose.

SABOTAGE.template: Neutralize a facility belonging to {enemyGroupName} on {planetName} before it becomes operational.
{clientName} wants {enemyGroupName}'s infrastructure silenced for good, on {planetName}.

RECON.template: Gather intelligence on {enemyGroupName}'s activities in the {planetName} sector.
{clientName} needs a full dossier on {enemyGroupName} before risking a move on {planetName}.

DIPLOMACY.template: Negotiate a deal with {targetName} on behalf of {clientName}, despite pressure from {enemyGroupName}.
Represent {clientName}'s interests before {targetName} on {planetName}, a planet on edge.

EXTRACTION_OP.template: Recover {targetName}, held by {enemyGroupName} on {planetName}, before it's too late.
{clientName} demands the extraction of {targetName} from {enemyGroupName}'s hands, on {planetName}.
